_comment: Compact 2-day persona used for real-LLM brutal tests. Kept short on purpose to bound API cost. Contains: durable identity facts + recurring topic + one clear contradiction + one curiosity gap.
name: Pat (developer)
background: Backend engineer at FinTech Inc, switching projects.

days.label: monday
turns: Pat: My name is Pat and I work at FinTech Inc.
Pat: I'm a backend engineer, focused on the payments API.
Pat: We use PostgreSQL for our main database.
Pat: My favorite editor is VSCode.

days.label: tuesday
turns: Pat: Quick update — I switched from the payments team to the fraud team.
Pat: We're building on Kafka now for event streaming.
Pat: PostgreSQL is still the main store though.

expected_recall.description: Pat's name from day 1 must survive to day 2

expected_curiosity_gaps.description: Kafka mentioned, agent should learn about it via curiosity if enabled
